title: ophrys ciliata subsp. lusitanica
intro: Ophrys ciliata subsp. lusitanica is a subspecies of the Ophrys ciliata orchid, a type of flowering plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys ciliata subsp. lusitanica are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, this plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
